name: meetings-with-remarkable-men
description: G. I. Gurdjieff's Meetings with Remarkable Men — a spiritual autobiography and esoteric wisdom toolkit chronicling Gurdjieff's travels through Central Asia in search of hidden knowledge, his encounters with teachers, and the foundations of the Fourth Way teaching.
useCase: Understand Gurdjieff's Fourth Way — the search for hidden knowledge, self-remembering, the Law of Three and Seven, and the Work of inner transformation.
knownRisks: Gurdjieff's claims about his travels and the Sarmoung Brotherhood are unverified and likely legendary
The Fourth Way system is complex and deliberately esoteric — it is not a quick self-help method
Some readers may find Gurdjieff's writing style (especially in Beelzebub's Tales) impenetrable
